sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, arr Array(UInt32), flag Nullable(UInt8));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, [1, 3, NULL, 4], 1), (2, [5, 6, 7, NULL], NULL), (3, [NULL, NULL, 0, 2], 0);
SELECT id, indexOf(arr, 3) AS index_of_3 FROM test_table WHERE flag AND indexOf(arr, NULL) > 0;
SELECT id, indexOf(arr, 4) AS index_of_4 FROM test_table WHERE flag IS NOT NULL AND indexOf(arr, 2) = 0;
SELECT id, indexOf(arr, NULL) FROM (SELECT id, arr FROM test_table WHERE flag IS NULL) WHERE indexOf(arr, 1) AND arr[1] = 3;
WITH (SELECT avg(indexOf(arr, NULL)) FROM test_table) AS avg_index SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE indexOf(arr, 5) AND flag = avg_index;
SELECT id, arr, indexOf(arr, 0) AS index_of_0 FROM test_table WHERE indexOf(arr, 7) = 0 AND flag AND id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE flag IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE temp_test AS SELECT id, indexOf(arr, 1) AS index_of_1 FROM test_table WHERE arr != [] GROUP BY id HAVING index_of_1 > 0;
SELECT id, indexOf(arr, 2) AS index_of_2 FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id, arr FROM test_table) WHERE arr[2] IS NOT NULL AND indexOf(arr, 2) > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_of_non_null FROM test_table WHERE indexOf(arr, NULL) AND flag IS NOT NULL GROUP BY flag HAVING count_of_non_null > 1;
